name: Women's Fashion Boutique
description: End-to-end operating system for independent women's clothing boutiques — buying through client relationships.

lifecycle.name: Buying & Planning
lifecycle.description: Open-to-buy, vendor sourcing, purchase orders, seasonal budgeting

lifecycle.name: Receiving & Inventory
lifecycle.description: PO receipts, tagging, stock counts, shrinkage tracking

lifecycle.name: Merchandising
lifecycle.description: Pricing strategy, floor layout, visual merchandising, lookbook production

lifecycle.name: Sales & Clienteling
lifecycle.description: Client book, style profiles, appointment scheduling, special orders

lifecycle.name: Marketing & Promotions
lifecycle.description: Email campaigns, social media, trunk shows, loyalty rewards, seasonal events

lifecycle.name: Operations & Service
lifecycle.description: Staff scheduling, alterations, returns, store maintenance, vendor payments

lifecycle.name: Finance & Reporting
lifecycle.description: Daily close, margin analysis, payroll, cash flow, open-to-buy reconciliation

workers.name: Open-to-Buy Planner
workers.capabilitySummary: Calculates open-to-buy budget by month and category; tracks planned vs. actual receipts; flags over-bought positions before the season closes

canvasTabs.label: OTB Summary
canvasTabs.description: Current open-to-buy by month and category — planned vs. actual vs. remaining

canvasTabs.label: Receipts
canvasTabs.description: Incoming purchase orders — on-order, in-transit, received this week

canvasTabs.label: By Category
canvasTabs.description: OTB split across tops, dresses, bottoms, outerwear, accessories

workers.name: Vendor & PO Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks all vendor relationships, purchase orders, terms, and delivery windows; flags late shipments and minimum-order violations

canvasTabs.label: Vendors
canvasTabs.description: All active vendors — terms, contact, season history, payment status

canvasTabs.label: Open POs
canvasTabs.description: Outstanding purchase orders — amount, expected delivery, status

canvasTabs.label: Late Shipments
canvasTabs.description: Orders past expected delivery — escalation status and vendor contact

workers.name: Inventory Intelligence
workers.capabilitySummary: Identifies top sellers, slow movers, and dead stock by SKU, category, and vendor; recommends reorder points and markdown candidates

canvasTabs.label: Top Sellers
canvasTabs.description: Best-performing SKUs by units sold and sell-through rate

canvasTabs.label: Slow Movers
canvasTabs.description: Items below target sell-through — markdown candidates and days-on-hand

canvasTabs.label: Reorder
canvasTabs.description: SKUs at or near reorder point based on velocity and lead time

workers.name: Pricing & Markdown Engine
workers.capabilitySummary: Optimizes initial markup, markdown timing, and discount depth to hit sell-through goals without leaving margin on the table

canvasTabs.label: Markdown Calendar
canvasTabs.description: Scheduled markdowns by date — category, depth, expected sell-through impact

canvasTabs.label: By Category
canvasTabs.description: Current AUR and IMU by category vs. target

canvasTabs.label: Price History
canvasTabs.description: SKU-level price history — original, each markdown event, final clearing price

workers.name: Visual Merchandising Planner
workers.capabilitySummary: Plans floor layout, display rotations, and window themes; generates change-out schedules aligned with buying calendar and new receipts

canvasTabs.label: Floor Plan
canvasTabs.description: Current fixture layout and zone assignments

canvasTabs.label: Rotations
canvasTabs.description: Upcoming display changes — date, zone, theme, responsible staff

canvasTabs.label: Windows
canvasTabs.description: Window display calendar tied to marketing and new arrivals

workers.name: Client Book
workers.capabilitySummary: Maintains rich style profiles for top clients — size, brand preferences, purchase history, life events; generates personalized outreach and new-arrivals alerts

canvasTabs.label: Top Clients
canvasTabs.description: VIP clients ranked by LTV — purchase history, contact cadence, style notes

canvasTabs.label: Outreach
canvasTabs.description: Clients due for follow-up — new arrivals that match their profile, occasions coming up

canvasTabs.label: Style Profiles
canvasTabs.description: Individual client style cards — sizes, brands, fit notes, wishlists

workers.name: Loyalty & Rewards
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages loyalty tiers, point balances, birthday offers, and reward redemptions; flags clients near tier upgrades for targeted outreach

canvasTabs.label: Tiers
canvasTabs.description: Client counts by tier — Bronze/Silver/Gold — and tier thresholds

canvasTabs.label: Near Upgrade
canvasTabs.description: Clients within reach of next tier — outreach opportunity to close the gap

canvasTabs.label: Birthdays
canvasTabs.description: Upcoming client birthdays with offer status

workers.name: Alterations & Special Orders
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks alterations tickets, tailor turnaround times, and special orders from vendors; notifies clients when items are ready

canvasTabs.label: Active Tickets
canvasTabs.description: Open alteration tickets — client, item, tailor, promised date, status

canvasTabs.label: Ready
canvasTabs.description: Completed alterations waiting for client pickup — days waiting, contact status

canvasTabs.label: Special Orders
canvasTabs.description: Client special orders on order from vendors — expected dates, deposit status

workers.name: Email & SMS Campaign Manager
workers.capabilitySummary: Creates and sends targeted email and SMS campaigns — new arrivals, trunk shows, sales events, lookbooks — segmented by purchase history and style preference

canvasTabs.label: Campaigns
canvasTabs.description: All campaigns — sent, scheduled, and draft — with open/click rates

canvasTabs.label: Upcoming
canvasTabs.description: Next 4 weeks of planned campaigns — event-driven and evergreen

canvasTabs.label: Segments
canvasTabs.description: Email list segments — by tier, category preference, purchase recency (RFM)

workers.name: Social Media & Lookbook Creator
workers.capabilitySummary: Generates social content calendar, creates styled lookbook posts using Fal.ai image generation, schedules posts to Instagram/TikTok/Pinterest; tracks engagement

canvasTabs.label: Content Calendar
canvasTabs.description: 30-day social content plan — draft, scheduled, and published by platform

canvasTabs.label: Recent Posts
canvasTabs.description: Last 30 posts with engagement metrics — likes, saves, reach, link clicks

canvasTabs.label: Lookbooks
canvasTabs.description: Seasonal lookbooks — current season in production, published archives

workers.name: Staff Scheduler
workers.capabilitySummary: Builds weekly schedules based on sales forecasts and team availability; tracks hours for payroll compliance; flags overtime and understaffed peak periods

canvasTabs.label: This Week
canvasTabs.description: Current week schedule by associate — hours, coverage, open shifts

canvasTabs.label: Next Week
canvasTabs.description: Upcoming schedule draft — awaiting publish or already confirmed

canvasTabs.label: Hours
canvasTabs.description: YTD hours by associate — overtime alerts, payroll-period summaries

workers.name: Daily Sales Reconciler
workers.capabilitySummary: Closes the day: reconciles POS totals against cash drawer and card batches, flags discrepancies, pushes to accounting; generates daily and weekly trend reports

canvasTabs.label: Today
canvasTabs.description: Today's sales — net sales, units, avg transaction, vs. plan and vs. LY

canvasTabs.label: Weekly Trend
canvasTabs.description: 7-day sales trend — daily net sales bar chart, running MTD vs. budget

canvasTabs.label: Discrepancies
canvasTabs.description: Unresolved POS-to-cash discrepancies awaiting review

workers.name: Margin & COGS Analyzer
workers.capabilitySummary: Tracks gross margin by category and vendor; identifies which brands and styles are actually profitable after markdowns; informs next season's buying decisions

canvasTabs.label: By Category
canvasTabs.description: Gross margin % by category vs. target and vs. LY

canvasTabs.label: By Vendor
canvasTabs.description: Realized margin by brand/vendor after all markdowns

canvasTabs.label: Markdown Impact
canvasTabs.description: How markdowns dented margin this season — units, depth, timing analysis

workers.name: Alex — Chief of Staff
workers.capabilitySummary: Daily briefing: yesterday's sales vs. plan, OTB status, markdown alerts, client follow-ups due, alteration pickups ready, upcoming campaigns. Coordinates all boutique workers.

canvasTabs.label: Daily Briefing
canvasTabs.description: Alex's morning summary: sales vs. plan, OTB, top client actions, operational alerts

bundles.name: Boutique Starter
bundles.description: The essential OS for a boutique: know what to buy, what's selling, and who your best clients are.
bundles.saves: Spreadsheet buying tracking + manual client notes + separate email tool

bundles.name: Boutique Complete
bundles.description: Full boutique operations suite — buying through finance, clienteling through marketing.
bundles.targetPersona: Multi-associate boutique or small boutique group
bundles.saves: NuOrder + Shopify analytics + Klaviyo + manual scheduling + spreadsheet margins
